name: Grand Theft Auto: The Diamond Casino Heist (Feat. Loona)
description:
This operation targets the city’s most secure building every detail counts from careful setup and reconnaissance to choosing your approach inside security measures shift constantly forcing quick thinking and adaptation and every decision can change the outcome for you and your team even if plans go awry there’s always a way to salvage the situation relying on skill strategy and the strength of your crew and while some faces on the team seem ordinary enough not everyone may be entirely what they appear...

(WARNING: May not be fully accurate idk i tried my best with this lol)
creator: Scratch-tracker4
